_comment: O'Dwyer Handbook of PI and PID Controller Tuning Rules (3rd Ed). FOPDT rules use km/tm/taum. SOPDT rules use km/tm/taum/zeta (zeta=damping ratio, default 1.0 for critically damped).

ziegler_nichols.name: Ziegler-Nichols (FOPDT)
ziegler_nichols.description: Classic Ziegler-Nichols process reaction rule. Quarter decay ratio response.
ziegler_nichols.unique_feature: Industry standard baseline; quarter decay ratio target; taum/Tm <= 1

cohen_coon.name: Cohen-Coon (FOPDT, high DT)
cohen_coon.description: Cohen-Coon process reaction method. Extends ZN for taum/Tm between 1.0 and 2.0.
cohen_coon.unique_feature: Extends ZN into high dead-time region (1.0 < taum/Tm <= 2.0); corrects for large delay ratios

zhuang_atherton.name: Zhuang & Atherton - Min ISE Regulator (FOPDT)
zhuang_atherton.description: Zhuang & Atherton minimum ISE regulator. Optimised for fast disturbance rejection.
zhuang_atherton.unique_feature: Minimises ISE for regulatory (load disturbance) response; power-law formula; Zhuang & Atherton 1993

rovira.name: Rovira - Min IAE Servo (FOPDT)
rovira.description: Rovira minimum IAE servo tuning. Smooth setpoint tracking.
rovira.unique_feature: Minimises IAE for servo setpoint tracking; balanced smooth response; Rovira 1969 benchmark

chien_regulator_0os.name: Chien et al. - Regulator 0% OS (FOPDT)
chien_regulator_0os.description: Chien et al. regulator for zero overshoot.
chien_regulator_0os.unique_feature: Guarantees 0% overshoot regulatory mode; Chien, Hrones & Reswick 1952

chien_regulator_20os.name: Chien et al. - Regulator 20% OS (FOPDT)
chien_regulator_20os.description: Chien et al. regulator 20% overshoot. Faster disturbance recovery.

chien_servo_0os.name: Chien et al. - Servo 0% OS (FOPDT)
chien_servo_0os.description: Chien et al. servo 0% overshoot. Very conservative smooth setpoint tracking.
chien_servo_0os.unique_feature: Guarantees 0% overshoot for setpoint steps; Ti = 1.17*Tm

chien_servo_20os.name: Chien et al. - Servo 20% OS (FOPDT)
chien_servo_20os.description: Chien et al. servo 20% overshoot. Faster setpoint tracking.
chien_servo_20os.unique_feature: Explicit 20% overshoot servo mode; Ti = Tm directly

murrill_servo.name: Murrill - Quarter Decay Ratio Servo (FOPDT)
murrill_servo.description: Murrill servo targeting quarter decay ratio. Power-law regression formula.
murrill_servo.unique_feature: Power-law regression; quarter decay ratio servo target; Murrill 1967 thesis

astrom_regulator_20os.name: Astrom & Hagglund - Regulator 20% OS (FOPDT)
astrom_regulator_20os.description: Astrom & Hagglund textbook regulator for 20% overshoot (page 150).
astrom_regulator_20os.unique_feature: From Astrom & Hagglund PID Controllers textbook p.150

st_clair.name: St. Clair - Conservative PI (FOPDT)
st_clair.description: St. Clair conservative tuning. Very stable and slow.
st_clair.unique_feature: Very conservative; Ti = Tm exactly; St. Clair 1953

rovira_iae_servo.name: Rovira - Min IAE Servo (FOPDT)
rovira_iae_servo.description: Rovira minimum IAE servo. Optimised for smooth setpoint tracking.
rovira_iae_servo.unique_feature: Minimises IAE for servo mode; Rovira et al. 1969

rovira_itae_servo.name: Rovira - Min ITAE Servo (FOPDT)
rovira_itae_servo.description: Rovira minimum ITAE servo. Penalises long-lasting errors.
rovira_itae_servo.unique_feature: ITAE penalises persistent errors; slowest servo rule; best for noise-sensitive processes

murrill_iae_regulator.name: Murrill - Min IAE Regulator (FOPDT)
murrill_iae_regulator.description: Murrill minimum IAE regulator. Power-law for optimal load rejection.
murrill_iae_regulator.unique_feature: Minimises IAE for load disturbance rejection; Murrill 1967 doctoral thesis

murrill_ise_regulator.name: Murrill - Min ISE Regulator (FOPDT)
murrill_ise_regulator.description: Murrill minimum ISE regulator. Penalises large errors heavily.
murrill_ise_regulator.unique_feature: ISE penalises large errors; fastest initial disturbance response; Murrill 1967

murrill_itae_regulator.name: Murrill - Min ITAE Regulator (FOPDT)
murrill_itae_regulator.description: Murrill minimum ITAE regulator. Best when long-lasting deviations are costly.

zhuang_ise_servo.name: Zhuang & Atherton - Min ISE Servo (FOPDT)
zhuang_ise_servo.description: Zhuang & Atherton minimum ISE servo. Fastest setpoint tracking.
zhuang_ise_servo.unique_feature: ISE servo optimisation; highest gain servo rule; Zhuang & Atherton 1993

zhuang_istse_regulator.name: Zhuang & Atherton - Min ISTSE Regulator (FOPDT)
zhuang_istse_regulator.unique_feature: ISTSE = ISE weighted by t^2; penalises very late-occurring errors

zhuang_istes_regulator.name: Zhuang & Atherton - Min ISTES Regulator (FOPDT)
zhuang_istes_regulator.unique_feature: ISTES composite time-error criterion; Zhuang & Atherton 1993

zhuang_istse_servo.name: Zhuang & Atherton - Min ISTSE Servo (FOPDT)
zhuang_istse_servo.unique_feature: ISTSE servo variant; Ti linear function of ratio

zhuang_istes_servo.name: Zhuang & Atherton - Min ISTES Servo (FOPDT)
zhuang_istes_servo.description: Zhuang & Atherton minimum ISTES servo. Smoothest composite-criterion servo.
zhuang_istes_servo.unique_feature: Lowest gain Zhuang servo; no overshoot by design

haalman.name: Haalman - Direct Synthesis Ms=1.9 (FOPDT)
haalman.description: Haalman direct synthesis with sensitivity Ms=1.9. Simple 2/3 gain formula.
haalman.unique_feature: Derived by specifying Ms=1.9 sensitivity; Ti=Tm exactly; Haalman 1965

chen_yang.name: Chen & Yang - Direct Synthesis Ms=1.26 (FOPDT)
chen_yang.description: Chen & Yang direct synthesis. Achieves Ms=1.26, AM=2.24, PM=50 degrees.
chen_yang.unique_feature: Targets Ms=1.26, Am=2.24, PM=50 deg; Chen & Yang 1995

smith_corripio_regulator.name: Smith & Corripio - DS Regulator (FOPDT)
smith_corripio_regulator.description: Smith & Corripio direct synthesis min IAE regulator.
smith_corripio_regulator.unique_feature: Pure DS: Ti=Tm, Kc=Tm/(Km*taum); from Smith & Corripio textbook p.343-346

smith_corripio_servo.name: Smith & Corripio - DS Servo (FOPDT)
smith_corripio_servo.description: Smith & Corripio DS servo. Detuned gain for smoother setpoint response.
smith_corripio_servo.unique_feature: Servo DS: Kc reduced by 3/5 vs regulator; Ti=Tm

miluse_0os.name: Miluse et al. - 0% Overshoot (FOPDT)
miluse_0os.description: Miluse et al. direct synthesis guaranteed 0% overshoot.
miluse_0os.unique_feature: Rigorously guarantees 0% overshoot; Ti=Tm; Miluse et al. 1994

miluse_5os.name: Miluse et al. - 5% Overshoot (FOPDT)
miluse_5os.description: Miluse et al. direct synthesis for exactly 5% overshoot.

miluse_10os.name: Miluse et al. - 10% Overshoot (FOPDT)
miluse_10os.description: Miluse et al. for exactly 10% overshoot.

miluse_20os.name: Miluse et al. - 20% Overshoot (FOPDT)
miluse_20os.description: Miluse et al. for 20% overshoot servo response.
miluse_20os.unique_feature: 20% overshoot; broadest OS family (0-50%) of any PI set

miluse_30os.name: Miluse et al. - 30% Overshoot (FOPDT)
miluse_30os.description: Miluse et al. for 30% overshoot. Aggressive fast servo response.
miluse_30os.unique_feature: 30% overshoot; fastest Miluse variant; critical processes

hang_gm15.name: Hang et al. - GM=1.5 PM=30deg (FOPDT)
hang_gm15.description: Hang et al. for Gain Margin=1.5, PM=30 degrees.
hang_gm15.unique_feature: Explicit GM=1.5, PM=30 deg; relay-based ID; fastest Hang variant

hang_gm2.name: Hang et al. - GM=2 PM=45deg (FOPDT)
hang_gm2.description: Hang et al. for GM=2, PM=45 degrees. Standard engineering robustness.
hang_gm2.unique_feature: GM=2, PM=45 deg - standard robustness target; Hang et al. 1991

hang_gm3.name: Hang et al. - GM=3 PM=60deg (FOPDT)
hang_gm3.description: Hang et al. for GM=3, PM=60 degrees.
hang_gm3.unique_feature: GM=3, PM=60 deg; for processes with model uncertainty; Hang 1991

hang_gm4.name: Hang et al. - GM=4 PM=67.5deg (FOPDT)
hang_gm4.description: Hang et al. GM=4, PM=67.5 degrees. Very high robustness.
hang_gm4.unique_feature: GM=4, PM=67.5 deg; near-maximum achievable PI robustness

haalman_sopdt.name: Haalman - Direct Synthesis (SOPDT)
haalman_sopdt.description: Haalman DS adapted for second-order plus dead time. Modifies Kc for extra lag. From O'Dwyer 3rd Ed, Table 4.2.
haalman_sopdt.unique_feature: SOPDT extension of Haalman; accounts for 2nd lag via zeta; conservative; O'Dwyer Table 4.2

imc_sopdt_servo.name: Rivera IMC - Servo (SOPDT)
imc_sopdt_servo.kc_math: (2.0 * zeta * tm + taum) / (km * (taum + 2.0 * 0.25 * taum + (0.25 * taum)**2 / tm))
imc_sopdt_servo.description: Rivera Internal Model Control PI for second-order processes. Lambda=0.25*taum. From O'Dwyer 3rd Ed, SOPDT IMC section.
imc_sopdt_servo.unique_feature: IMC-based; lambda=0.25*taum; handles 2nd-order dynamics; Rivera 1986 extended

skogestad_sopdt_reg.name: Skogestad SIMC - Regulator (SOPDT)
skogestad_sopdt_reg.description: Skogestad SIMC rule for SOPDT. Simple and robust - from Skogestad 2003 and referenced in O'Dwyer 3rd Ed appendix.
skogestad_sopdt_reg.unique_feature: SIMC: Kc=Tm/(Km*2*taum); Ti=min(Tm,8*taum); near-optimal for robustness; Skogestad 2003

skogestad_sopdt_servo.name: Skogestad SIMC - Servo (SOPDT)
skogestad_sopdt_servo.description: Skogestad SIMC servo for SOPDT. Ti=Tm for good setpoint tracking.
skogestad_sopdt_servo.unique_feature: SIMC servo: Ti=Tm; faster setpoint response than regulator version; Skogestad 2003

tyreus_luyben_sopdt.name: Tyreus-Luyben - Robust (SOPDT)
tyreus_luyben_sopdt.description: Tyreus-Luyben tuning for SOPDT. Known for low overshoot and robust stability. From O'Dwyer 3rd Ed, SOPDT section.
tyreus_luyben_sopdt.unique_feature: Tyreus-Luyben robustness adapted for SOPDT; Ti=2.587*effective-tau; very low overshoot; O'Dwyer 3rd Ed

wang_jones_lopdt_sopdt.name: Wang & Jones - Min IAE Regulator (SOPDT)
wang_jones_lopdt_sopdt.description: Wang & Jones minimum IAE for SOPDT. Adapts Ziegler-Nichols for second-order. From O'Dwyer 3rd Ed, Table 4.6.
wang_jones_lopdt_sopdt.unique_feature: Extends ZN min-IAE for SOPDT; accounts for second-order damping; O'Dwyer Table 4.6

astrom_sopdt_imc.name: Astrom et al. - IMC-based (SOPDT)
astrom_sopdt_imc.description: Astrom et al. IMC-based tuning for SOPDT. Lambda=0.3*taum. From O'Dwyer 3rd Ed.
astrom_sopdt_imc.unique_feature: IMC with lambda=0.3*taum for SOPDT; balances performance and robustness; Astrom & Hagglund extended

ho_sopdt_iae.name: Ho et al. - Min IAE (SOPDT)
ho_sopdt_iae.description: Ho et al. minimum IAE for SOPDT regulators. Power-law with damping correction. From O'Dwyer 3rd Ed.
ho_sopdt_iae.unique_feature: SOPDT power-law min-IAE; zeta correction term; Ho, Hang & Cao 1995; O'Dwyer 3rd Ed Table 4.7

chen_robust_ms100.name: Chen et al. - Robust Ms=1.00 AM=3.14 (FOPDT)
chen_robust_ms100.description: Chen et al. Ms=1.00 - no resonance peak. Maximum stability.
chen_robust_ms100.unique_feature: Ms=1.00 means no frequency amplification; maximum robustness; Chen 1995

chen_robust_ms120.name: Chen et al. - Robust Ms=1.20 AM=2.34 (FOPDT)
chen_robust_ms120.description: Chen et al. Ms=1.20. Standard industrial robustness: AM=2.34, PM=51.6 deg.
chen_robust_ms120.unique_feature: Ms=1.2 - standard industrial robustness target; best speed-stability balance

chen_robust_ms150.name: Chen et al. - Robust Ms=1.50 AM=1.96 (FOPDT)
chen_robust_ms150.description: Chen et al. Ms=1.50. More aggressive: AM=1.96, PM=44.1 deg.
chen_robust_ms150.unique_feature: Ms=1.5 acceptable limit; fastest Chen robust variant; Chen 1995

rivera_imc.name: Rivera et al. - IMC Robust PI (FOPDT)
rivera_imc.description: Rivera et al. Internal Model Control robust PI. Lambda >= 1.7*taum.
rivera_imc.unique_feature: IMC-based derivation; lambda=1.7*taum adjustable; Rivera 1986 industry standard

chien_imc.name: Chien - IMC Robust PI lambda=Tm (FOPDT)
chien_imc.description: Chien robust IMC PI with lambda=Tm. Conservative, stable, no overshoot.
chien_imc.unique_feature: IMC with lambda=Tm; guaranteed stability; safety-critical loops; Chien 1988

fruehauf_robust_low.name: Fruehauf et al. - Robust Low DT (FOPDT)
fruehauf_robust_low.description: Fruehauf et al. robust for lag-dominant processes (taum/Tm < 0.33).
fruehauf_robust_low.unique_feature: Two-regime rule: for taum/Tm < 0.33; Ti=5*taum; Fruehauf et al. 1993

fruehauf_robust_high.name: Fruehauf et al. - Robust High DT (FOPDT)
fruehauf_robust_high.description: Fruehauf et al. robust for dead-time-significant processes.
fruehauf_robust_high.unique_feature: High DT regime; Ti=Tm; conservative; Fruehauf et al. 1993

lee_robust.name: Lee et al. - CL Response lambda=0.333*taum (FOPDT)
lee_robust.description: Lee et al. targeting closed-loop response e^(-taum*s)/(lambda*s+1), lambda=0.333*taum.
lee_robust.unique_feature: Specifies exact desired closed-loop TF; lambda=0.333*taum; Lee et al. 1996

isaksson_graebe.name: Isaksson & Graebe - Robust lambda=0.4*Tm (FOPDT)
isaksson_graebe.description: Isaksson & Graebe robust PI with lambda=0.4*Tm.
isaksson_graebe.unique_feature: Lambda=0.4*Tm; systematic robust design; Isaksson & Graebe 1999

smith_delay_dominant.name: Smith - 6dB Gain Margin Delay Dominant (FOPDT)
smith_delay_dominant.description: Smith DS for delay-dominant processes. 6dB gain margin. Kc independent of Tm.
smith_delay_dominant.unique_feature: For delay-dominant processes (taum >> Tm); 6 dB gain margin; Smith 1957

brambilla_robust.name: Brambilla et al. - Robust <5% OS (FOPDT)
brambilla_robust.description: Brambilla et al. robust design guaranteed <5% overshoot.
brambilla_robust.unique_feature: Guarantees <5% overshoot; explicitly robust against parameter variation

chun_robust_20pct.name: Chun et al. - Robust 20% Param Uncertainty (FOPDT)
chun_robust_20pct.description: Chun et al. robust PI for 20% uncertainty in all process parameters.
chun_robust_20pct.unique_feature: Explicit 20% parametric uncertainty specification; lambda=0.4*Tm; Chun 1999

voda_landau_pm60.name: Voda & Landau - Symmetrical Optimum PM=60 (FOPDT)
voda_landau_pm60.description: Voda & Landau symmetrical optimum for 60 degree phase margin.
voda_landau_pm60.unique_feature: Symmetrical optimum principle; PM=60 deg; Voda & Landau 1995

astrom_honeywell.name: Astrom et al. - Honeywell UDC 6000 (FOPDT)
astrom_honeywell.description: Astrom et al. rule embedded in Honeywell UDC 6000 industrial autotuner.
astrom_honeywell.unique_feature: Embedded in Honeywell UDC 6000 autotuner; relay+closed-loop identification

davydov_ds.name: Davydov et al. - DS Damping=0.9 (FOPDT)
davydov_ds.description: Davydov et al. DS for closed-loop damping factor = 0.9.
davydov_ds.unique_feature: Damping=0.9 specification; Ti is linear function of Tm/taum

bi_et_al.name: Bi et al. - Direct Synthesis (FOPDT)
bi_et_al.description: Bi et al. direct synthesis PI using closed-loop identification.
bi_et_al.unique_feature: Uses closed-loop step response identification; Bi, Cai, Wang 1999
